name: Jimmy Randolph
abstract: James Randolph (February 21, 1934 – July 29, 2013) was an American singer of the 1960s. In 1976–1977, he took played the role of Sky Masterson in the Broadway revival of Guys and Dolls.

about_quotes.speaker: Roland Hanna
about_quotes.evidence: And Jimmy Randolph or James Cheatham... And we went together. We met several people... So we stayed in Liberia... And we went to several countries around and did performances.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roland Hanna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
